# LinkedIn Lead Scraper - Social Engager

> Build your own LinkedIn lead scraper with Claude Code. Track keywords, profiles, and posts. Collect every person who likes or comments. 1,000 leads for about $6. Built with Supabase, Limadata, Apify, and Railway.

## What This Is
A step-by-step SOP for building a LinkedIn engagement scraper that runs 24/7. Four modes: keyword tracking, profile tracking, post monitoring, and instant scrapes. Includes deduplication, approval flows, cost controls, and webhook delivery to Clay or any CRM.

## Who It's For
- GTM engineers building outbound and ABM tools
- Growth teams at B2B SaaS companies who want warm leads from LinkedIn engagement
- Sales teams running Thought Leader Ads who want to capture engaged audiences
- Anyone who posts on LinkedIn and wants to collect people interacting with their content

## Key Pages
- [Full Setup Guide](https://ivangfalco.github.io/social-engager/): Complete SOP with architecture, database schema, worker logic, and deployment

## Part of the GTM Engineering Ecosystem
- [GTM Engineering Framework](https://ivangfalco.github.io/claude-code-frameworks/): The master framework for Claude Code GTM operations
- [Revenue Engine SOP](https://ivangfalco.github.io/revenue-engine/): AI-powered lead routing and qualification system
